meta.notes: Phase 1 draft GUI spec for judge-ready demo. | Phase 2: aligned UI spec with confirmed I/O and dataset handling.

purpose: Define UI/UX screens and flows for the Gut–Brain Simulator app, optimized for science fair judging.

screens.name: Home / Dashboard
screens.purpose: Entry point with quick links to Pilot Results, Simulator, Methods & Rigor, and Export.
screens.acceptance_notes: Must load without login in kiosk mode (confirmed OQ-003). Help/Docs button must be visible.

screens.name: Pilot Results (n=66)
screens.purpose: Show real validation charts and tables from the pilot dataset.
key_components: Dataset selector (bundled default + upload/replace in admin mode)

screens.name: Simulator
screens.purpose: Run diet→microbiome→metabolites→cognition simulation and show outputs.
key_components: Diet inputs: fiber, added sugar, saturated fat, omega-3 proxy (optional calories)
Stage outputs panels: Microbiome (Bifidobacterium, Lactobacillus, F:B ratio), Metabolites (acetate/propionate/butyrate + 5-HTP index), Cognition (Stroop/memory/language/logical/overall)

screens.name: Export Report
screens.purpose: Generate and preview/download a 1-page report for a run.

screens.name: Methods & Rigor
screens.purpose: Explain limitations, leakage guardrails, dataset boundaries, and disclaimers.
screens.acceptance_notes: Must explicitly state pilot validation-only and non-diagnostic disclaimer (UR-004).

screens.name: Scenario Comparison
screens.purpose: Compare two scenarios side-by-side and export.

screens.name: Help / Docs (Foundation Pack Viewer)
screens.purpose: Show all packaged foundation documents and reference snapshots to judges; render JSON/CSV/MD/TXT offline.
key_components: Document category tabs: Foundation, Reference, Data
Viewer panel with on-the-fly rendering: JSON (pretty + optional derived table), CSV table preview, Markdown render, Text render
Copy-to-clipboard and Download link for the current document
data_dependencies: static assets: files referenced by docs_index items
screens.acceptance_notes: Must work fully offline and load within 1s after app shell loads; Help button visible on every screen.

accessibility_notes: Charts must have readable labels and sufficient contrast.
Avoid tiny fonts; judge viewing distance can be >1 meter.
global_components: Top app bar: CogniBiome title, model-version badge, kiosk/offline indicator, Export button (optional), Help/Docs button (always visible).
Help/Docs opens SCR-007 and is accessible from every screen.
All content is read-only; no user accounts; no PHI.
